hero.description: From offset printing and packaging to books, labels, calendars and finishing, Sumathi Printers delivers professional print production for Sri Lankan businesses and institutions.

about.title: At the Forefront of Printing and Publishing in Sri Lanka
paragraphs: Sumathi Publishers, a partnership established in 1984, was the forerunner to Sumathi Book Printing (Pvt) Ltd, which was incorporated in 1991.
The company was later renamed Sumathi Printers (Pvt) Ltd in 2011, operating as a subsidiary of Sumathi Global Consolidated (Pvt) Ltd.
about.technology: State-of-the-art machinery, technology and accessories combined with qualified personnel help the press meet demanding quality standards while maintaining confidentiality and agreed time schedules.

missionVision.vision: To be a key player in the printing industry in the pursuit of quality and service excellence while earning our employees’ and customers’ enthusiasm through continuous improvement driven by integrity, teamwork and innovation.
missionVision.mission: Committed to providing comprehensive printing solutions dedicated to excellence in customer service, product quality and environmental responsibility while ensuring profitable growth for staff, customers and suppliers.

features.title: High Quality Printing
features.text: Sharp, consistent, professional printing output for every requirement.

features.title: Modern Equipment
features.text: Technology-driven production with modern machinery and qualified personnel.

features.title: Reliable Delivery
features.text: Confidential, affordable and schedule-focused production workflow.

serviceCards.title: Offset Colour Lithography
serviceCards.text: Professional colour printing for publications, marketing materials and business stationery.

serviceCards.title: Packaging Box Printing
serviceCards.text: Custom printed packaging boxes designed to improve brand presentation and product protection.

serviceCards.title: Books & Magazine Printing
serviceCards.text: Reliable book, catalog and magazine production with finishing options for polished results.

processSteps.title: Share Requirement
processSteps.text: Send your artwork, sample, product size, paper type or print idea.

processSteps.title: Choose Materials
processSteps.text: Select paper, board, sticker stock, binding style, lamination or finishing.

processSteps.title: Approve Details
processSteps.text: Confirm artwork, quantity, delivery details and production timeline.

processSteps.title: Receive Delivery
processSteps.text: Your completed print order is packed and delivered reliably.

testimonials.title: Reliable Quality and Professional Service
testimonials.quote: Sumathi Printers provides dependable print quality, clear communication and timely delivery for repeated print requirements.

testimonials.name: Business Client
testimonials.title: Clean Finishing and Strong Presentation
testimonials.quote: Their packaging, labels and marketing print work helped us maintain a professional brand presence.
